summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WorkTimer application. Fixed icon import issues (AlertCircle, Save) and successfully tested all core functionality including login, dashboard, navigation, and CRUD operations.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with statistics cards (2 total schede, 0 in corso, 2 completate, 0% efficienza)
Navigation to all pages: Clienti, Schede Lavoro, Operazioni, Report, Admin
Clienti page shows existing clients (2 Test Cliente entries)
Nuova Scheda form opens with complete form fields (cliente selection, lavoro, ordini, date, operazioni)
Operazioni page displays 9 operation templates (Taglio, Rilegatura, Incollaggio, etc.)
Report page loads with 30 chart elements (SVG/Canvas)
Admin page shows user management (1 admin user)
Form validation and data persistence working

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All navigation, forms, and UI components functional
